◎译　　名　儿童电影史话 / 儿童电影故事
◎片　　名　A Story of Children and Film
◎年　　代　2013
◎产　　地　英国
◎类　　别　纪录片
◎语　　言　英语
◎上映日期　2013-05-17(戛纳电影节)
◎IMDb评分  7.0/10 from 711 users

◎片　　长　100分钟
◎导　　演　马克·卡曾斯 Mark Cousins

◎简　　介  

　　by Mark Cousins is the first global portrait of children in the cinema. Using excerpts from 53 films from 25 different countries, this documentary is a “infantile” sequel to THE STORY OF FILM : AN ODYSSEY by the same director. A documentary produced by Mary Bell and Adam Dawtrey of BofA Productions.
